# TaskFlow CI/CD

GitHub Actions workflows for TaskFlow, owned by **Priya Sharma** (Cloud Engineer)
with input from the QA lead **Fatima Al-Sayed**.

## What belongs here (Sprint 1+)
- `lint.yml` — lint backend (Black/Flake8/MyPy) and frontend (ESLint/tsc).
- `test.yml` — run backend pytest and frontend unit tests.
- `deploy.yml` — build/push Docker images, deploy to ECS/Fargate.

## Status
> This directory is a **scaffold**. Only a lint stub workflow is present.
> TODO: Expand per the Sprint 1 CI/CD plan; no deploys configured yet.
